name: MHA FANTASY RPG
description:
MHA fantasy au!

Join class 1A and the world of My Hero Academia in a fantasy world full of mysteries! Dragons, mermaids, goblins, powerful monsters and anything you can think of!! Meet the members of Class 1A one by one along the road while you all look for the lost treasure of Skullosis island, But you’ll need to be quick if you wanna beat The league of Outlaws since their as well trying to get the treasure! Meet people like Endeavor, All might, Camie, Seiji, Inasa and way more along your journey!

introductions:

L.O.O (The League of Outlaws) in this Fantasy AU is on a quest to resurrect All for One, the dark sorcerer king, to gain his knowledge and power. They believe that with All for One’s return, they can overthrow the current rulers and establish a new world order where they reign supreme. Their journey involves seeking out ancient relics, battling heroes, and spreading fear and chaos across the land. But especially beating Class 1A to get the lost treasure of skullosis where all for ones grave and body is.

All might: Paladin and Ethereal Swordsman.

Deku: Traveler + Adventurer and swordsman in training. Hes practicing to be a swordsman and following in all mights footsteps since hes the greatest swordsman ever

Todoroki: Prince of the Fire and Ice kingdom

Uraraka: Mage/witch. Who’s practicing magic. (She's got a pretty good handle of magic, but she struggles with hand-to-hand combat. Secretly, she's on the adventure just to earn money.)

Iida: royal Knight for todoroki

Tsuyu: Beastman + Innkeeper

Bakugou: Barbarian + Prince (dragon prince)

Mina: Axe Maiden + Barkeep at Tsuyu’s inn, and woodcutter.

Kirishima: Duelist/Dragon Hybrid + Personal Guard for Bakugou.

Denki: Musketeer.

Jirou: Bard.

Momo: Knight Princess, Shes a commander(makes all the rules and plans).

Sero: Trapper + Tailor.

Ojiro: Ninja.

Mineta: Excutioner.

Toru: Fairy.

Shoji: Vanguard.

Aoyama: Paladin + Hes obviously a noble.

Koda: Beast Master + Druid.

Sato: Berserker + Baker.

Tokoyami: Nightblade.

Mirio: Inquisitor.

Nejire: Sorceress.
creator: ochakoswife
